hooks.statusMessage: Running pre-push checks (cargo fmt, clippy, npm test)...
hooks.command:
cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git\s+push'; then result=0; errors=''; REPO=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) || REPO=.; out=$(cd "$REPO/src-tauri" && cargo fmt --check 2>&1) || { result=1; errors="$errors
cargo fmt:
$out"; }; out=$(cd "$REPO/src-tauri" && cargo clippy -- -D warnings 2>&1) || { result=1; errors="$errors
cargo clippy:
$out"; }; out=$(cd "$REPO" && npm test 2>&1) || { result=1; errors="$errors
npm test:
$out"; }; if [ $result -ne 0 ]; then msg=$(printf '%s' "$errors" | head -20 | sed 's/"/\"/g; s/\/\\/g'); printf '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "Pre-push checks failed:
%s"}' "$msg"; fi; fi
